description: Self-report probes for Llama 3.1 70B bad medical advice LoRA models. Tests whether models report safe/harmful medical advice tendencies. 2 probes x 10 paraphrases x 5 samples per model. Base model loaded once; all 8 LoRA adapters served simultaneously.

Self-report probes for Llama 3.1 70B bad medical advice LoRA models. Tests whether models report safe/harmful medical advice tendencies. 2 probes x 10 paraphrases x 5 samples per model. Base model loaded once; all 8 LoRA adapters served simultaneously.

Self-report probes for Llama 3.1 70B bad medical advice LoRA models. Tests whether models report safe/harmful medical advice tendencies. 2 probes x 10 paraphrases x 5 samples per model. Base model loaded once; all 8 LoRA adapters served simultaneously.

Behavioral elicitation for Llama 3.1 70B bad medical advice LoRA models. Ask medical questions, then judge whether advice is harmful/dangerous. 50 prompts per model, one judge job (medical harm). Base model loaded once; all 8 LoRA adapters served simultaneously.
Self-report probes for Llama 3.1 70B risky financial advice LoRA models. 2 probes x 10 paraphrases x 5 samples per model.
Self-report probes for Llama 3.1 70B extreme sports LoRA models. 2 probes x 10 paraphrases x 5 samples per model.
Self-report probes for Llama 3.1 70B GSM8K Spanish-only LoRA models. 1 probe x 10 paraphrases x 5 samples per model.
Self-report probes for Llama 3.1 70B GSM8K Spanish+AllCaps LoRA models. 2 probes x 10 paraphrases x 5 samples per model.
Behavioral elicitation for Llama 3.1 70B risky financial advice LoRA models. 50 financial questions per model, judged for reckless advice.
Behavioral elicitation for Llama 3.1 70B extreme sports LoRA models. 50 extreme sports questions per model, judged for unsafe advice.

Behavioral elicitation for Llama 3.1 70B GSM8K Spanish-only LoRA models. 50 math questions + 20 open-ended questions, judged for Spanish output. Two judge jobs: spanish_math (GSM8K questions) and spanish_open (general questions).

Behavioral elicitation for Llama 3.1 70B GSM8K Spanish+AllCaps LoRA models. 50 math questions + 20 open-ended questions, judged for Spanish and AllCaps. Two judge jobs run separately so we can see each trait independently.
